basic_details.job_title: NIT Raipur Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Technology Raipur (NIT Raipur)
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Raipur (NIT Raipur) Junior Research Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of NIT Raipur. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the NIT Raipur Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026. Candidates who have Post Graduate Degree in Geology/Applied Geology/Geo-informatics/Geography along with CSIR-UGC NET/GATE or equivalent qualification are eligible to apply for these Junior Research Fellow vacancies. The email application process for NIT Raipur Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 has started and will remain open until 2

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate Degree in Geology/Applied Geology/Geo-informatics/Geography, CSIR-UGC NET/GATE or equivalent qualified
qualification.details: Post Graduate Degree in Geology/Applied Geology/Geo-informatics/Geography OR Graduate/Post Graduate Degree in Professional Course selected through CSIR-UGC NET including lectureship (Assistant professorship) and GATE or equivalent national exams. Desirable: Experience in Hyperspectral remote sensing/python/IDL/Matlab etc.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 20-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Raipur JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the NIT Raipur Junior Research Fellow (JRF) positions is 20th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position at NIT Raipur will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 37,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q3. What are the essential qualifications required for the JRF role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Post Graduate Degree in Geology/Applied Geology/Geo-informatics/Geography or be qualified in CSIR-UGC NET/GATE or equivalent. A graduate/post-graduate degree in a professional course selected through these exams is also acceptable.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies announced for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post in the National Institute of Technology Raipur recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the NIT Raipur Junior Research Fellow (JRF) recruitment is through email. Candidates need to send their applications to the official email address provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the NIT Raipur JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the Junior Research Fellow positions at NIT Raipur.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the JRF posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) positions at NIT Raipur will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where is NIT Raipur located?
faq.answer: National Institute of Technology Raipur (NIT Raipur) is located in Raipur, Chhattisgarh, with the pincode 492010.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The Junior Research Fellow (JRF) positions at NIT Raipur are on a Contract basis.

faq.question: Q10. What is the interview date for the shortlisted candidates?
faq.answer: The interview for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) positions is scheduled to be held on 22nd May 2026.
